description: Style Note woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylish top-stitching on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Product Details Two-tone olive green Nubuk upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heel, stitches on the seams of the toe box, two-hole lace up, padded tongue, padded insole for in-step comfort, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic, rubber midsole, dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and onto the heel for maximum comfort Material and Care Nubuk, TPU Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
